```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";

// fs

// ./index.js



/* export default */ const index = (__rspack_external_fs["default"]);


it("should distinguish external default and namespace imports", async () => {
  const mod = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ "./main.mjs");

  expect(mod.default).toBe(__rspack_external_fs["default"]);
  expect(mod.default).toBe(__rspack_external_fs["default"]);
  expect(typeof mod.fsNs.readFile).toBe("function");
});

export { __rspack_external_fs as fsNs };
export default index;

```
